package middleware

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
	"log"
	"net/http"
)

// Global singleton logger - anti-pattern
var GlobalLogger = log.New(log.Writer(), "[GLOBAL] ", log.LstdFlags)

// Global singleton config - anti-pattern
var GlobalConfig = map[string]string{
	"api_key":    "hardcoded-key",
	"db_host":    "localhost",
	"log_level":  "debug",
	"feature_x":  "enabled",
}

type CaseMiddlewareUsesGlobalLoggerOrConfigSingletonDTO struct {
	ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
	TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
	Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
	Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareUsesGlobalLoggerOrConfigSingletonModel struct {
	ID       string         `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
	TenantID string         `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string         `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
	DeletedAt sql.NullTime  `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareUsesGlobalLoggerOrConfigSingletonRepository struct {
	db    *gorm.DB
	sqlDB *sql.DB
}

func PositiveMiddlewareUsesGlobalLoggerOrConfigSingleton(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB) error {
	middleware := func(next gin.HandlerFunc) gin.HandlerFunc {
		return func(c *gin.Context) {
			GlobalLogger.Printf("Request started: %s %s", c.Request.Method, c.Request.URL.Path)

			if GlobalConfig["feature_x"] == "enabled" {
				GlobalLogger.Println("Feature X is enabled, applying middleware logic")
				c.Set("feature_x_active", true)
			}

			apiKey := GlobalConfig["api_key"]
			GlobalLogger.Printf("Using API key: %s", apiKey)

			logLevel := GlobalConfig["log_level"]
			if logLevel == "debug" {
				GlobalLogger.Printf("Debug mode: headers=%v", c.Request.Header)
			}

			next(c)

			GlobalLogger.Printf("Request completed with status: %d", c.Writer.Status())
		}
	}

	handler := func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "handled"})
	}

	middleware(handler)(c)
	return nil
}
